title: SEC3: validate_did_key should use ED25519_MULTICODEC constant for slice comparison
description: In validate_did_key (identity.rs:184-188), the multicodec prefix is validated against hardcoded bytes [0xed, 0x01]. Since ED25519_MULTICODEC is already defined, comparing &decoded_bytes[0..2] != ED25519_MULTICODEC would be more elegant and ensure consistency with make_did_key. Reduces magic number duplication and makes the connection between validation and production code explicit.
